seo.title: Medical Spa Review Management Software | ReviewFlo
seo.description: Get more Google reviews for your medspa. Route unhappy clients to private feedback before it hits Google. Free forever, no credit card required.

hero.heading: Review Management Built for Medical Spas
hero.subheading: Clients care about privacy. ReviewFlo helps you ask for Google reviews without putting treatments in the spotlight.

painPoints.sectionHeading: The Review Problem Every Medical Spa Faces

items.heading: Clients don't want to publicize cosmetic procedures
items.body: A Botox client isn't posting about their treatment publicly — even if they loved it. Privacy is the default.

items.heading: One bad outcome review wipes out months of good ones
items.body: One frustrated client can leave a public 1-star that sits at the top. You need a way to catch issues privately first.

items.heading: You're competing against clinics with $20k marketing budgets
items.body: Big groups can push reviews with paid tools and big teams. You need a simple system that runs without extra work.

steps.title: Step 1 — Send the link after checkout
steps.body: Text or email a ReviewFlo link right after the appointment.

steps.title: Step 2 — 1–4 stars goes to you privately
steps.body: If they’re unhappy, they send feedback to you privately.

steps.title: Step 3 — 5-star clients go straight to Google
steps.body: If they’re happy, they’re guided to leave a Google review.

items.heading: Built for the medspa client relationship
items.body: Your requests can focus on the experience, not the treatment.

items.heading: Catch complaints before they go public
items.body: Unhappy clients can message you privately instead of posting publicly.

items.heading: More reviews without awkward asks
items.body: Send requests by text or email after each appointment. It’s consistent and easy to repeat.

items.heading: $270/month cheaper than Podium
items.body: Podium is $289/month. ReviewFlo Pro is $19/month, and there’s a free plan.

items.q: Will medspa clients actually leave reviews for cosmetic procedures?
items.a: Yes — when asked the right way. Templates can focus on the experience (staff, environment, results) instead of the specific treatment.

items.q: What happens when a client is unhappy?
items.a: They rate 1–4 stars and send you a private message instead of going to Google.

items.q: How is this different from Podium or Birdeye?
items.a: Same core flow: send requests, route unhappy clients to private feedback, and guide happy clients to Google. ReviewFlo is built for small medspa teams.

items.q: Does this work with our booking software?
items.a: You can send requests manually, or use the API to connect booking platforms.

items.q: Can I use this across multiple locations?
items.a: Yes. The AI plan supports multiple locations with separate dashboards and links.

finalCta.heading: Start Getting More Medspa Reviews Today
finalCta.subheading: Free forever. No credit card. Your first review request goes out in under 5 minutes.
